item.title: Authentik SSO
item.description:
Before implementing Authentik, I was running Adguard Home, the Arr stack (5-6 apps), Jellyfin. Each with its own local account, all sharing one simple password to keep access frictionless on a network I treated as trusted. Absolutely horrible security across the board, honestly. The only meaningful control I had in place was that it’s all on my internal network.

Changing the password meant updating it across every service manually. If my network was ever compromised, it wouldn’t take long for an attacker to gain full access across the board.

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is a bold new horizon.

Going where no-me has gone before.

item.title: About
item.description:
A no-life degenerate gamer turned productive member of society. My time playing competitive games was where I found lifelong friends, a fierce drive to be best, and an enduring habit to forget about bedtime until 3am.

Unfortunately, we must all grow up eventually. After some time in customer service, I realised that I’m only happy when believing the work I do is both meaningful and actively attempts to make a difference in people’s lives.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
The best way to reach me is email:

contact@morknork.com

You’ll also find me on GitHub and LinkedIn.
